sql: SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE (department_id IN (#{group.deptIds}) AND status IN (#{group.statuses}))
templateSql:
SELECT id, name FROM users
<if test="userGroups != null and userGroups.size() > 0">
    WHERE
    <foreach collection="userGroups" item="group" separator=" OR ">
        (department_id IN
        <foreach collection="group.deptIds" item="deptId" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{deptId}
        </foreach>
        AND status IN
        <foreach collection="group.statuses" item="status" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{status}
        </foreach>
        )
    </foreach>
</if>
